Summary

Short Description: INC10457821  ngcs656.2.sr02.dal13  process  IpRib' restarted 
Outage Start:2025-12-02 08:31:44
Outage End:
Severity: 4
Source of detection: monitoring
Impact / Actions

Description of event: A process failure on the device. This can range from high CPU and COPP drops to the inability to save config or a total process failure.
Potential customer impact: Stalled transactions

Actions taken: 
Actions pending/ongoing:
Root Cause

RCA: 
FPA:
close_notes: Our vendor will be engaged to get an RFO, however no customer affection has been reported or noticed during the event
